declaration.label: F5 CIS Lab — managed by Ansible + CIS
declaration.remark: Base AS3 declaration. CIS will dynamically patch virtualAddresses and pool members based on Kubernetes VirtualServer / TransportServer CRs. Do not manually edit pool members — CIS owns them.

k8s._comment: Tenant name must match bigip_partition in CIS values (zarf-config.yaml BIGIP_PARTITION).

k8s_http_vs.remark: HTTP virtual server — CIS patches virtualAddresses via IngressLink or VirtualServer CRs

k8s_https_vs.remark: HTTPS virtual server with SSL offload

k8s_http_pool.remark: HTTP backend pool — members managed by CIS (NodePort mode)

k8s_https_pool.remark: HTTPS backend pool — members managed by CIS

k8s_cert.remark: Replace with a real cert or reference a cert-manager issued cert
